originalTitle: Sudan drone attack on key hospital killed 64 people during Eid, WHO says
title: Sad News from Sudan: Helping Hands Need Peace
content:
Hello, My Friends!

Hi everyone! It's your friendly news reporter here, bringing you stories from our beautiful continent, Africa. Today, I have some news from a country called Sudan. It's a little bit sad, but it's important to talk about it so we can understand and hope for better things. We are going to talk about doctors, nurses, and how important it is for everyone to be safe, especially in places where people get help.

Where is Sudan?

Sudan is a very big country in Africa. It has sunny skies and big rivers, just like many places you know! Many wonderful people live in Sudan. They have homes, schools, and markets. Just like us, they love their families and want to live in peace. Did you know? Sudan is one of the biggest countries in Africa! It has a long, long river called the Nile flowing through it. It's truly amazing!

What is a Hospital For?

A hospital is a very special place. It's where doctors and nurses help people who are sick or hurt. If you fall and scrape your knee badly, or if you get a fever, you might go to a hospital. They have beds, medicines, and clever machines to make people feel better. Hospitals are places of healing and hope. Did you know? Doctors and nurses work very hard day and night. They are like superheroes who help us stay healthy and strong!

What Happened?

Now, for the sad part. In Sudan, something very, very sad happened at a hospital. A special hospital, where many people go to get better, was hit by something called a drone. This happened during a very special time for many people, a celebration called Eid. Sadly, 64 people lost their lives because of this. Among them were 13 little children. Imagine, 13 children who should have been playing and laughing. Also, two kind nurses and a doctor who were helping people also lost their lives. This made many people very, very sad. Did you know? When something bad happens in a hospital, it makes it harder for other sick people to get the help they need.

Who Are the Helpers?

Even when sad things happen, there are always helpers. Doctors and nurses are always there. There is also a very important group called the WHO. WHO stands for World Health Organization. They are like a big team of doctors and health helpers from all over the world. They work to make sure everyone can be healthy and get medicine. The WHO is very sad about what happened in Sudan. They told everyone about the sad news. They want to make sure hospitals are safe places for everyone. Did you know? The WHO helps children and grown-ups in almost every country in the world! They teach people about good health.

What is a Drone?

You might be wondering, what is a drone? A drone is like a small flying robot. Sometimes people use drones to take cool pictures from high in the sky. Or sometimes, they can help deliver important things to places that are hard to reach. But sadly, sometimes drones are used for bad things, like the one that hurt the hospital in Sudan. When drones are used to hurt people, it is a very bad thing. Everyone wants drones to be used for good, not for hurting people or places like hospitals.

What is Eid?

This sad event happened during a very special celebration called Eid. Eid is a happy time for many people in Sudan and all over the world. During Eid, families come together, share special meals, and give gifts. It's a time for joy and togetherness. Imagine a big party, like your birthday, but for many, many people at the same time! That's how special Eid is. It makes what happened even sadder, because it took away the joy from a time meant for happiness. Did you know? There are two main Eid celebrations each year, and people prepare special foods and wear new clothes to celebrate!

Why Is This Sad?

This news is very sad because hospitals should always be safe places. They are places for healing, not for hurting. When doctors, nurses, and even children are hurt in a hospital, it is a big problem. It means that people who are trying to help others cannot do their important work. And children, like you, should always be safe, everywhere. We want all hospitals to be safe places where everyone, whether they are sick or helping, can be protected.

What Can We Do?

Even though we are far away, we can still do something. We can think about the children and families in Sudan. We can draw pictures of peace. We can be extra kind to our friends and family. This helps spread peace in our own homes and schools. When we are kind, we show that we want everyone to be safe and happy. We can also hope and wish for peace in Sudan. We want the doctors and nurses to be safe so they can keep helping people.

Let's Hope for Peace!

So, my friends, let's remember the people in Sudan. Let's send our kind thoughts to them. Let's hope that soon, peace will come to Sudan, and all hospitals will be safe places for everyone. Because everyone deserves to live in peace and good health. Thank you for listening.
summary: A very sad event happened in Sudan where a hospital, a place for healing, was hurt by a flying robot called a drone, causing 64 people, including 13 children, two nurses, and a doctor, to lose their lives during a special celebration.
whyMatters: It is very important for hospitals to be safe places because doctors and nurses work there to help sick and hurt people, and everyone, especially children, deserves to be safe and live in peace.

title: Kenyans fighting illegally for Russia in Ukraine to be granted amnesty
content: It is illegal for Kenyans to serve in foreign armies and can carry a sentence of up to 10 years in jail.
